```{=html}
<aside class="side-panel scorecard-sidebar">
<details open>
<summary>Reading the scorecard</summary>
<dl>
  <dt><code>z = (MC − cf) / stderr</code></dt>
  <dd><code>|z| ≤ 2</code> is healthy sampling noise;
  <code>|z| &gt; 3</code> points at a simulator bug.</dd>

  <dt><code>±CI<sub>95</sub> = 1.96·SD/√n</code></dt>
  <dd>95% half-width of the MC mean. Shrinks as
  <code>1/√n<sub>paths</sub></code>.</dd>

  <dt>Variance ratio</dt>
  <dd><code>Var[Π<sub>b2b</sub>]/Var[R<sub>fee</sub>] = (P/f)²</code>.
  Algebraic — not subject to MC noise.</dd>

  <dt>VaR<sub>95</sub> / CVaR<sub>95</sub></dt>
  <dd>5% loss threshold / tail mean. On the fee book: "low end of
  revenue" (revenue ≥ 0 by construction).</dd>

  <dt>Horizon total</dt>
  <dd>P&amp;L is total USD over <code>[0, T]</code>. Divide by
  <code>N = λT</code> for a per-tonne figure.</dd>

  <dt>Merton row</dt>
  <dd>Expect <code>|z| ≲ 2</code> vs. GBM closed form and
  <strong>SD(merton) &gt; SD(gbm)</strong>. Flat SD = overlay inert.</dd>
</dl>
</details>
</aside>
```
